definitions: Mishchuk Inna Mykhailivna is a Ukrainian Paralympic athlete who competes in shot put, discus throw, and javelin throw.
She is known for her achievements in para-athletics, representing Ukraine in various international competitions.
examples: Mishchuk Inna Mykhailivna won a medal at the World Para Athletics Championships.
The coach praised Mishchuk Inna Mykhailivna for her dedication.
Mishchuk Inna Mykhailivna is a role model for aspiring athletes.
